bullets: Developed and maintained cross-platform Flutter applications for Android, iOS, and Windows using Clean Architecture principles.
Implemented Bloc/Cubit state management for scalable, testable, and maintainable codebases across multiple production apps.
Integrated RESTful APIs, Firebase services, and real-time WebSocket communication (Socket.io) for live data synchronization.
Designed offline-first local databases with SQLite and Hive, including background sync and conflict resolution logic.
Built ESC/POS thermal printing modules supporting USB, Bluetooth, and IP network connections with Arabic RTL receipt rendering.
Refactored monolithic codebases into feature-based modular architecture, reducing coupling and improving team velocity.
Integrated Google Maps, Mapbox, and geolocation services for location-based features and real-time tracking.
Implemented push notification pipelines using Firebase Messaging and OneSignal for user engagement and alerts.
Developed payment integrations including Razorpay, in-app purchases, and secure JWT-based authentication flows.
Optimized app performance for low-end devices and POS terminals, including memory management and lazy loading strategies.
Collaborated in Agile teams using Git/GitHub for version control, code reviews, and CI-friendly branching workflows.
Integrated Agora RTC Engine for real-time audio/video consultation features with adaptive bitrate handling.
Built image compression and upload pipelines reducing storage costs by up to 70% before cloud upload.
Implemented ZATCA-compliant e-invoicing workflows with QR code generation for the Saudi Arabian market.
Created paginated data controllers with local caching (sqflite) for smooth scrolling through large datasets.
Developed background GPS tracking services with battery-optimized location update rates for driver applications.
Applied flutter_secure_storage and screen protection for DRM-compliant content delivery in e-learning apps.
Built calendar-based booking UIs with dynamic availability locking and optimistic reservation state machines.
Integrated Laravel Echo and Pusher for real-time chat with message delivery status tracking.
Shipped production apps to Google Play and App Store with full release pipeline management.
